name: devzero
description: A Pulumi provider for managing DevZero infrastructure resources.

token.description: The DevZero API token for authentication.

url.description: The DevZero API base URL. Defaults to https://dakr.devzero.io

alias.description: Well-known alias for the AMI family (e.g. 'al2@latest').

owner.description: AWS account ID or alias that owns the AMI.

ssmParameter.description: SSM parameter path that stores the AMI ID.

tags.description: Map of AWS tags used to select AMIs.

amiSelectorTerms.description: Selectors for the AMIs used to launch nodes.

associatePublicIpAddress.description: Whether to assign a public IP address to provisioned nodes.

blockDeviceMappings.description: EBS block device mappings for nodes.

capacityReservationSelectorTerms.description: Selectors for EC2 capacity reservations to prioritize.

detailedMonitoring.description: Enable detailed CloudWatch monitoring for instances.

instanceProfile.description: IAM instance profile name (use instead of Role when profile already exists).

instanceStorePolicy.description: Policy for handling instance store volumes. One of: 'RAID0'.

kubelet.description: Kubelet configuration overrides for AWS nodes.

role.description: IAM role name assigned to nodes.

securityGroupSelectorTerms.description: Selectors for security groups attached to nodes.

subnetSelectorTerms.description: Selectors for the subnets nodes will be launched into.

tags.description: AWS tags applied to all resources created by this node class.

userData.description: Custom user data script injected into the node launch template.

allowedUnsafeSysctls.description: Unsafe sysctl patterns that are allowed (e.g. 'net.ipv4.*').

containerLogMaxFiles.description: Maximum number of container log files to retain.

containerLogMaxSize.description: Maximum container log file size before rotation (e.g. '10Mi').

cpuCfsQuota.description: Whether to enforce CPU CFS quota for containers.

imageGcHighThresholdPercent.description: Disk usage percentage triggering image GC.

imageGcLowThresholdPercent.description: Disk usage percentage below which image GC stops.

podPidsLimit.description: Maximum number of process IDs per pod.

topologyManagerPolicy.description: Topology manager policy for NUMA-aware scheduling.

kubelet.description: Kubelet configuration overrides for Azure nodes.

maxPods.description: Maximum pods per node (overrides AKS default).

tags.description: Azure tags applied to all resources created by this node class.

vnetSubnetId.description: Azure VNet subnet resource ID for node networking.

deleteOnTermination.description: Whether to delete the EBS volume when the instance terminates.

encrypted.description: Whether to encrypt the EBS volume.

iops.description: IOPS to provision for io1/io2 volume types.

kmsKeyId.description: KMS key ID or ARN used to encrypt the volume.

snapshotId.description: EBS snapshot ID to restore the volume from.

throughput.description: Throughput in MiB/s for gp3 volumes.

volumeInitializationRate.description: Rate in MiB/s for initializing volumes from snapshots.

deviceName.description: Device name to map the volume to (e.g. '/dev/xvda').

ebs.description: EBS volume configuration for this device.

rootVolume.description: Whether this mapping is for the root volume.

ownerId.description: AWS account ID that owns the capacity reservation.

tags.description: Map of AWS tags used to select capacity reservations.

duration.description: Duration the budget window stays active (e.g. '1h', '30m').

nodes.description: Maximum nodes that may be disrupted, as an absolute count or percentage (e.g. '10%').

reasons.description: Disruption reasons this budget applies to (e.g. 'Underutilized', 'Empty', 'Drifted').

schedule.description: Cron schedule during which this budget is active (5-field format).

budgets.description: Disruption budgets limiting how many nodes can be disrupted at once.

consolidateAfter.description: Duration to wait after a node becomes empty before consolidating (e.g. '30s').

consolidationPolicy.description: When to consolidate nodes. One of: 'WhenEmpty', 'WhenUnderutilized'.

expireAfter.description: Duration after which provisioned nodes are replaced regardless of load (e.g. '720h').

terminationGracePeriodSeconds.description: Grace period in seconds before forcefully terminating a draining node.

ttlSecondsAfterEmpty.description: Seconds before an empty node is terminated (deprecated; prefer ConsolidateAfter).

maxReplicaChangePercent.description: Maximum percentage change in replica count per recommendation cycle.

maxReplicas.description: Maximum number of replicas to scale up to.

minDataPoints.description: Minimum data points required before a recommendation is emitted.

minReplicas.description: Minimum number of replicas to maintain.

primaryMetric.description: Primary metric for HPA decisions. One of: 'cpu', 'memory', 'gpu', 'network_ingress', 'network_egress'.

targetUtilization.description: Target utilization ratio (0-1) for the primary metric.

clusterDns.description: List of DNS server IP addresses used by kubelet.

cpuCfsQuota.description: Whether to enforce CPU CFS quota limits for containers.

evictionHard.description: Hard eviction thresholds that trigger immediate pod eviction.

evictionMaxPodGracePeriod.description: Maximum grace period in seconds when evicting pods.

evictionSoft.description: Soft eviction thresholds that trigger eviction after a grace period.

evictionSoftGracePeriod.description: Grace period for each soft eviction threshold.

imageGcHighThresholdPercent.description: Disk usage percentage that triggers image garbage collection.

imageGcLowThresholdPercent.description: Disk usage percentage below which image GC stops freeing space.

kubeReserved.description: Resources reserved for Kubernetes system components.

maxPods.description: Maximum number of pods per node.

podsPerCore.description: Maximum pods per CPU core (multiplied by core count for max pods).

systemReserved.description: Resources reserved for OS system daemons (e.g. {'cpu': '100m'}).

matchExpressions.description: List of label selector requirements joined by AND.

matchLabels.description: Map of label key-value pairs that must all match exactly.

key.description: The label key that the selector applies to.

operator.description: Operator relating the key and values. One of: 'In', 'NotIn', 'Exists', 'DoesNotExist'.

values.description: Array of string values. Required for 'In' and 'NotIn' operators.

httpEndpoint.description: Enable or disable the instance metadata endpoint. One of: 'enabled', 'disabled'.

httpProtocolIpv6.description: Enable IPv6 for the metadata endpoint. One of: 'enabled', 'disabled'.

httpPutResponseHopLimit.description: HTTP PUT response hop limit for metadata requests (1-64).

httpTokens.description: Whether to require IMDSv2 tokens. One of: 'optional', 'required'.

pattern.description: Regular expression pattern to match workload names.

nodeclassYaml.description: Raw YAML for a complete Karpenter NodeClass resource (escape hatch).

nodepoolYaml.description: Raw YAML for a complete Karpenter NodePool resource (escape hatch).

cpu.description: Maximum total CPU that may be provisioned (e.g. '1000' for 1000 vCPUs).

memory.description: Maximum total memory that may be provisioned (e.g. '1000Gi').

tags.description: Map of AWS tags used to select security groups.
Map of AWS tags used to select subnets.

key.description: Taint key to apply to provisioned nodes.

value.description: Taint value associated with the key.

adjustReqEvenIfNotSet.description: Recommend requests even when the workload has no existing requests set. Server/web default: true.

enabled.description: Enable vertical scaling for this resource type.

limitMultiplier.description: Multiplier applied to the request to derive the resource limit.

limitsAdjustmentEnabled.description: Whether to also adjust resource limits alongside requests.

limitsRemovalEnabled.description: Actively remove limits from workloads (CPU only). Takes precedence over limitsAdjustmentEnabled. Web default: true for CPU, false for Memory.

maxRequest.description: Maximum resource request in millicores (CPU) or bytes (memory/GPU).

maxScaleDownPercent.description: Maximum percentage decrease allowed in a single recommendation cycle.

maxScaleUpPercent.description: Maximum percentage increase allowed in a single recommendation cycle.

minDataPoints.description: Minimum number of data points required before a recommendation is emitted.

minRequest.description: Minimum resource request in millicores (CPU) or bytes (memory/GPU).

overheadMultiplier.description: Multiplier applied on top of the recommendation to add headroom.

targetPercentile.description: Percentile of usage data used as the recommendation target (e.g. 0.95).

token.description: Authentication token for the cluster. Rotated automatically if empty on update (e.g. after import).

description.description: Free-form description of the node policy.

disruption.description: Karpenter disruption policy for consolidation and expiry.

instanceCategories.description: Filter instances by category (e.g. general-purpose, compute-optimized).

instanceFamilies.description: Filter instances by family (e.g. m5, c6i).

instanceSizes.description: Filter instances by size (e.g. large, xlarge).

limits.description: Resource limits on the total capacity managed by this policy.

name.description: Human-friendly name for the node policy.

nodeClassName.description: Override name for the generated Karpenter NodeClass.

nodePoolName.description: Override name for the generated Karpenter NodePool.

operatingSystems.description: Operating systems for nodes (e.g. linux, windows).

raw.description: Raw Karpenter YAML for full NodePool/NodeClass customization.

weight.description: Priority weight for this policy; higher values take precedence.

zones.description: Availability zones where nodes may be provisioned.

clusterIds.description: Cluster IDs where this node policy applies.

enabled.description: Whether this target is active. Defaults to true.

policyId.description: Node policy ID this target is attached to.

cooldownMinutes.description: Minutes to wait between applying recommendations. Default: 300 (5 h).

cronSchedule.description: Cron expression for scheduled application (5-field format).

driftDeltaPercent.description: Percentage drift from baseline that triggers VPA refresh.

enablePmaxProtection.description: Raise requests to cover peak usage when max/recommendation ratio exceeds pmaxRatioThreshold. Server/web default: true.

hysteresisVsTarget.description: Hysteresis threshold vs target for HPA coordination.

liveMigrationEnabled.description: Allow live migration when applying recommendations.

loopbackPeriodSeconds.description: Period in seconds to look back for resource usage data. Default: 86400 (24 h).

minChangePercent.description: Global minimum change threshold for applying recommendations. Default: 0.2 (20%).

minDataPoints.description: Global minimum data points required for recommendations. Default: 15.

minVpaWindowDataPoints.description: Minimum data points in VPA analysis window. Default: 30.

pmaxRatioThreshold.description: Max-to-recommendation ratio that triggers pmax protection. Default: 3.0.

stabilityCvMax.description: Maximum coefficient of variation for workload to be considered stable.

startupPeriodSeconds.description: Period in seconds to ignore usage data after workload starts.

cooldownMinutes.description: Minutes to wait between applying recommendations. Default: 300 (5 h).

cronSchedule.description: Cron expression for scheduled application (5-field format).

driftDeltaPercent.description: Percentage drift from baseline that triggers VPA refresh.

enablePmaxProtection.description: Raise requests to cover peak usage when max/recommendation ratio exceeds pmaxRatioThreshold. Server/web default: true.

hysteresisVsTarget.description: Hysteresis threshold vs target for HPA coordination.

liveMigrationEnabled.description: Allow live migration when applying recommendations.

loopbackPeriodSeconds.description: Period in seconds to look back for resource usage data. Default: 86400 (24 h).

minChangePercent.description: Global minimum change threshold for applying recommendations. Default: 0.2 (20%).

minDataPoints.description: Global minimum data points required for recommendations. Default: 15.

minVpaWindowDataPoints.description: Minimum data points in VPA analysis window. Default: 30.

pmaxRatioThreshold.description: Max-to-recommendation ratio that triggers pmax protection. Default: 3.0.

stabilityCvMax.description: Maximum coefficient of variation for workload to be considered stable.

startupPeriodSeconds.description: Period in seconds to ignore usage data after workload starts.

clusterIds.description: Cluster IDs where this target applies.

kindFilter.description: Restrict matching to specific Kubernetes kinds (e.g. Deployment, Pod).

nodeGroupNames.description: Restrict matching to specific node groups by name.

policyId.description: Workload policy ID this target is attached to.

priority.description: Evaluation priority; higher values take precedence when targets overlap.

workloadNames.description: Explicit list of workload names to include.

name.description: The cluster name to look up.

teamId.description: The team ID to search within.

clusterId.description: The ID of the cluster matching the given team and name.
